message:
feat(storage,search): migrate FTS5 to contentless mode (schema V14)

Migrate the fts_messages FTS5 table from internal-content mode (with a
redundant message_id UNINDEXED payload column storing all indexed columns
in shadow tables) to contentless mode (content=''), reducing database
size by ~45% by storing only the inverted index.

Schema (src/storage/sqlite.rs):
- Bump CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION from 13 to 14
- Add MIGRATION_V14: drops and recreates fts_messages with content=''
- Remove message_id UNINDEXED from FTS5_REGISTER_SQL
- Reorder all FTS batch insert paths (rebuild_fts_on_connection,
  franken_batch_insert_fts, batch_insert_fts_messages) to put rowid
  first instead of message_id as the last column
- Update MIGRATION_FRESH_SCHEMA DDL comments and structure
- Chain v14 migration in build_cass_migrations() and migrate()

Query layer (src/search/query.rs):
- Add sqlite_fts_uses_message_id_column() introspection helper that
  checks PRAGMA table_info to detect legacy vs contentless schema
- Rewrite search_sqlite_fts5() with schema-adaptive JOIN predicate:
  legacy uses CAST(fts_messages.message_id AS INTEGER) = m.id,
  contentless uses fts_messages.rowid = m.id
- All payload fields now come from canonical tables (messages,
  conversations, agents, workspaces) via JOINs instead of FTS5 columns
- Replace SQL snippet() aux function with Rust-side snippet_from_content()
  applied to m.content — contentless FTS5 cannot project stored columns
- Convert LEFT JOINs to INNER for required tables (messages,
  conversations, agents); workspaces remains LEFT JOIN (nullable)
- Add backward-compat test for legacy message_id schema

Indexer (src/indexer/mod.rs):
- Expand test FTS5 recreation guard to check for both missing created_at
  and presence of legacy message_id column
- Update test DDL to contentless mode

Integration tests (tests/storage.rs):
- Assert fts_messages DDL contains content='' and lacks message_id

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
